title: In-House Manufacturing
fullDesc: Our 15,000 sq ft facility houses casting, stone setting, polishing, QC and hallmarking — all under one roof. No outsourcing, no quality compromise.

title: OEM & Private Label
fullDesc: We manufacture diamond jewellery under your brand identity — from design to finished product. NDA-protected, MOQ-flexible, timeline-reliable.

title: Custom Design & ODM
fullDesc: Our in-house design team works from sketches, references, or CAD files. We prototype, refine and deliver — with IGI certification on every stone.

title: Export & Compliance
fullDesc: We handle documentation, hallmarking, and customs compliance for exports to UAE, USA, UK, EU, and South-East Asia. Ex-works or CIF.

title: Quality Assurance
fullDesc: Every piece passes a 12-point QC checklist before dispatch — weight, dimensions, stone grading, metal purity, finish, and hallmark verification.

title: Flexible MOQ & Pricing
shortDesc: Scales from boutique to retail chain
fullDesc: We work with independent boutiques requiring 50-piece runs and large retail chains needing 5,000+ pieces — pricing scales accordingly with volume.
